query: Google Chrome AI one-click prompts interface

images.description: A screenshot of the Google Chrome browser displaying the AI one-click prompts interface with sections for browsing and selecting skills like "Protein max," "Meal planner," and "Gift concierge."
A user interface for Google Chrome AI prompts displays a central image of a mountain scene, surrounded by options for editing, downloading, and selecting images and prompts.
A digital interface displays a list of one-click prompts for Google Chrome AI, with a background featuring a plate of assorted chopped vegetables and ingredients.

A user interface for Google Chrome's AI one-click prompts in the form of the "Skills" page, displaying popular skill suggestions like Protein Max, Meal Planner, and Gift Concierge, with categories such as Fun, Learning, Research, Shopping, Understand, and Writing.
